reviews.comment:
Te cargan lo que corresponde, la atención es genial y si sos mujer y querés pasar al baño te aconsejo ir acá, siempre esta limpito y te dejan pasar sin problemas

(Translated by Google)
They charge you the correct amount, the service is great, and if you're a woman and need to use the restroom, I recommend going here; it's always clean and they let you in without any problems.
